docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED DEC-15-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, TONY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY RAJWANI, SURAJ AS TO DEFENDANT PERKINS, TONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-10-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAJWANI, SURAJ IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PERKINS, TONY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF SURAJ RAJWANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TONY PERKINS IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
